title: YetAnotherBackpackMod
description: This mod is another mod wich add backpack to the game.
body: ![Title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9b9a27c145cffe53083b305c32778f8baf148f60.png)  **📖 About:** **This mod just recive a complete Re-Write this mod is still in BETA PHASE: thing my change or will expire: I'M NO RESPONSABLE FOR CORRUPTED WORLD: MAKE A BACKUP BEFORE UPDATING!!** This mod, as the title says, this  mod implement backpacks with upgrades to explore without inventory space compromises. **✨ Features:** This mod add backpacks with uniques craftings and Upgrades: - Crafting Upgrades: Allow to use crafting inside the backpack - Smelting Upgrades: Allow to use each type of smelters(Furnace, Smoker, Blast Furnace)  inside the backpack - Feed Upgrade: Allow to restore saturation with food inside the backpack(KNOWN ISSUE: ONLY WORK WHEN OPEN BACKPACK, SOON FIX) MORE UPGRADES WILL COME!! 🙋‍♀️ Do You Need Support? Join the [Discord](https://discord.com/invite/335vcPRg) Server: For any help or news about development or projects status. Also for the issue report. Check My Other Projects here
